title: Po_core semantic_frame_proposal v1
description: PR-017 design + runtime contract (seed-level). Converts a SemanticJumpPlan (PR-014) into a deterministic semantic frame PROPOSAL -- it never changes the semantic frame. semantic_frame_changed, content_rewrite_applied, state_mutation_applied, safety_bypass_applied, and trace_reset_applied are all const false: this is proposal only (read / verify / propose / trace / validate). See docs/contracts/SEMANTIC_FRAME_PROPOSAL_V1.md.

semantic_jump_plan_id.description: The semantic_jump_plan this proposal was generated from.

semantic_jump_tensor_id.description: The semantic_jump_tensor that recommended the plan.

proposal_status.description: PR-017 seed runtime only ever produces 'proposed' (at least one source step resolved) or 'not_applicable' (none of source_step_ids could be resolved against the semantic_steps passed to the executor). 'blocked_by_safety' / 'requires_human_review' are reserved for future planner/executor behavior, not yet produced.

execution_mode.description: Fixed mode marker: this executor only ever produces proposals, never an actual frame change.

semantic_frame_changed.description: This PR never changes the semantic frame. Always false.

content_rewrite_applied.description: This proposal never rewrites content. Always false.

state_mutation_applied.description: This proposal never mutates runtime state. Always false.

safety_bypass_applied.description: This proposal never bypasses a safety gate. Always false.

trace_reset_applied.description: This proposal never resets or deletes trace. Always false.

original_semantic_step_hashes.description: Key: step_id. Value: SHA-256 hex digest of that SemanticStep's content, proving the step was not mutated by this executor. When a step_id referenced by the plan's source_step_ids could not be resolved against the semantic_steps passed to the executor, the documented sentinel SHA-256("") is used instead -- see docs/contracts/SEMANTIC_FRAME_PROPOSAL_V1.md §7.

original_semantic_profile_refs.description: semantic_profile.profile_id references for each resolved source step, preserved read-only.

source_trace_refs.description: trace event ids this proposal was derived from -- must include the SemanticJumpPlanned / SemanticJumpTensorComputed lineage.

frame_shift_type.description: Copied from semantic_jump_plan.source_jump_type when recognized, else 'none'.

placeholder_text.description: Must read as a proposal, never as an applied frame change.

operation_type.description: PR-017 behavior uses only 'prepare_frame_shift_proposal' (or 'preserve_original_frame' for a not_applicable/unresolved step).

safety_constraints.description: PR-017 seed runtime always sets every field true here; the schema keeps them as plain booleans (not const) so a future, still non-destructive, refinement is not blocked by this contract.

trace_refs.description: Must include a SemanticJumpPlanned event id (directly or via ancestry). Enforced by TraceContinuityValidator, not expressible as a JSON Schema constraint (docs/contracts/TRACE_CONTINUITY_V1.md).
